MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPEN WATER CYCLING, INC., A CORPORATION NAVIGATORS INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION

DECLARATION OF MARISA G. HUBER IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFFS' OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPEN WATER CYCLING, INC., A CORPORATION NAVIGATORS INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION
REPLY TO OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY DEFENDANT SAIA MOTOR FREIGHT LINE, INC., A CORPORATION
ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-15-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. ANY REQUEST TO THE COURT BY MR. MORRIS, ASIDE FROM THE MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE (WHICH IS BEFORE THE COURT) WERE DENIED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SAIA MOTOR FREIGHT LINE, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS PREMISED ON PLAINTIFF HAVING NAMED AN INCORRECT DEFENDANT, BUT THE COURT CANNOT DETERMINE ON THIS MOTION THAT PLAINTIFF HAS NO CLAIM AGAINST SAIA INCORPORATED, THE ONLY NAMED DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO CARRY ITS BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT VENUE FOR THIS ACTION AGAINST SAIA INCORPORATED IS IMPROPER IN SAN FRANCISCO. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. ANY REQUEST TO THE COURT BY MR. MORRIS, ASIDE FROM THE MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE (WHICH IS BEFORE THE COURT) WERE DENIED.
